attributes.action: You must have a license & full training to be able to own animals
attributes.additional_details: This is a real issue & something needs sorted , but also people do not speak about it enough & me myself I’m a big animal lover & every animal deserves the best care & to be treat right
attributes.background: A Requirement to have an animal which should include a license & full training aswell as checks on the home so animals don’t get mistreated & put with the wrong people as this is becoming an occurrence! The animals themselves are suffering & becoming aggressive due to the neglect!

rejection.details:
Introduce Pet Licence for cats and dogs and require reporting cat collisions 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759752

Review Dangerous Dog Act 1991 and bring in dog ownership license and dog tagging 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760387

Require licence for all dog breeding in the UK and bring in new ownership laws 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750481
